case_title: JOHN B. VLAHOS VS. BILL PEAVEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B. AS TO DEFENDANT PEAVEY, BILL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VLAHOS, JOHN B. AS TO DEFENDANT PEAVEY, BILL
